issues.description: Blocker ability should not be represented as a trigger-action effect in DSL. Blocker is a keyword ability that modifies combat mechanics, not an effect that 'triggers' and 'rests'. The DSL should either omit it (if Blocker is handled as a keyword) or represent it fundamentally differently.
Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Trigger'. The ability activates '[End of Your Turn]'.
Condition is missing. Must check 'HasCardOnBoard' with scope 'Hand' and count ≤6, not 'Always'.
Action should be 'Rest' to set Leader as active, not 'PlaySelf'. 'PlaySelf' is for playing cards from hand/trash.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [End of Your Turn] If you have 6 or less cards in your hand, rest this Leader.
